title: 访问 .name 和 .value
prompt:
继续上一题的 `Color` 枚举（含 `RED=1` / `GREEN=2` / `BLUE=3`），这次：

1. `print(Color.GREEN.name)` —— 打印成员名
2. `print(Color.GREEN.value)` —— 打印成员值

输出应该是：
```
GREEN
2
```
starterCode:
# from enum import Enum
#
# class Color(Enum):
#     RED = 1
#     GREEN = 2
#     BLUE = 3
#
# print(Color.GREEN.name)
# print(Color.GREEN.value)
solution:
from enum import Enum

class Color(Enum):
    RED = 1
    GREEN = 2
    BLUE = 3

print(Color.GREEN.name)
print(Color.GREEN.value)
hints: .name 是字符串形式的成员名

完整代码：
from enum import Enum

class Color(Enum):
    RED = 1
    GREEN = 2
    BLUE = 3

print(Color.GREEN.name)
print(Color.GREEN.value)
